vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

physics_paths.description: Nacelle loads carried into fuselage spine
Aerodynamic lift and drag forces transferred from V-tail to ruddervator
Heat dissipation from stabilizer to landing gear mount
Landing gear motion transmitted to fuselage spine
Pressure distribution from ruddervator to stabilizer

integration_opportunities.description: Ensure wing spar socket, fuselage spine, and payload/battery service paths are separate and inspectable.
Ensure tilt mechanism loads route through bearing seats into wing structure via named fittings, and motor/servo modules remain replaceable through access covers.

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings, spar sockets, or mating pads
manufacturing_strategy.support_orientation: Support structures oriented for minimal overhang
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual inspection of primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings, spar sockets, and mating pads

verification_focus.description: Verify critical slip, snap, pin, hinge, and slide interfaces have plausible clearances.
Ensure fits are named with standard intent: clearance fit for sliding, transition for locating, interference/press only where justified, with a numeric allowance.
Verify holes, slots, and pockets match real catalog hardware sizes (M3/M4 clearance holes, standard bearing OD, common pin diameters).
Ensure tilt axis, bearing seats, servo/linkage access, and nacelle rotation clearance are visible.
Ensure wing spar socket, fuselage spine, and payload/battery service paths are separate and inspectable.
Ensure output remains educational mockup, avoiding operational flight tuning or control-law details.
Ensure tilt mechanism loads route through bearing seats into wing structure via named fittings, and motor/servo modules remain replaceable through access covers.
